prompt: Checkpoint pressure node with acceptable toCall price: choose action.
why_v1: When the price is still manageable, calling keeps the hand in cleanly without forcing a bigger action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The price is still acceptable, so calling continues cleanly without forcing a bigger action.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Folding gives up too much with the price still acceptable and still a manageable price, and raising pushes past a hand that continues more cleanly as a call instead of forcing a bigger action.
